name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Classic Gucci Margaret details paired with emerging brand signature elements. The Queen Margaret series bags are made of GG Supreme canvas, a versatile material that continues to play an important role in paying tribute to the brand's origins. 70s vintage design bee motif, set with glass pearls and colored crystals. The buckle that forms this small handbag! Suede-feel microfiber lining.
